answers: Start birding: get binoculars (8x42 recommended), a field guide, and visit local parks early morning. Patience is key!
Bird watching tips: stay quiet, wear neutral colors, learn bird calls, and keep a life list. Dawn and dusk are peak times.
Beginner birding: start in your backyard, use apps like Merlin Bird ID for identification, and join local birding groups.
Pakhi dekha tips: shokal e beroleo valo, durbin lagbe, chupchap thako, ar ekta notebook rakho kon pakhi dekhle likhe rakho.
